prompt:
Cinematic landscape photography (intended use, National Geographic caliber).
Scene: a primeval forest interior at dawn with drifting fog.
Subject: tall ancient cedar trunks rising into mist.
Key details: photorealistic rendering, beams of soft golden god-rays piercing through the canopy, lush ferns and moss-covered stones beside a tiny stream in the foreground, cool blue-green palette with warm light shafts, hyper-detailed bark texture, sharp focus throughout.
Constraints: no figures, no trails, no structures, no text, no watermark.
